text: The stark, modern quiet of the first room stirs a sense of anticipation in me, as though I am on the threshold of discovery. The absence of people makes me contemplate my own presence here. Moving into the second room, surrounded by vibrant colors and the language of innovation, I feel curiosity awaken within me. The mention of human coexistence with intelligent machines sparks thoughts about the boundaries between nature and technology, and I feel a gentle optimism about the future. Overall, being here is both grounding and expansive; I feel I am inhabiting a space where new ideas are waiting to unfold.
